title: pyrrosia stolzii
intro: Pyrrosia stolzii is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the Stolzii Shield Fern, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pyrrosia stolzii include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
